summary: Full frontend regression for the new multi-page layout (Dashboard / Tasks / Calendar / You + sidebar + ⌘K + activity heatmap). 10/11 flows PASS. Only issue: Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut did not open the CommandDialog under Playwright (fallback buttons work). Two minor Radix a11y warnings about missing DialogTitle were logged.

ui_bugs.issue: Keyboard shortcut did not open the palette in Playwright runs. Both fallback buttons (topbar-cmdk, sidebar-cmdk-btn) work and navigate correctly. Likely a Playwright focus nuance rather than a real bug, but worth verifying manually in a browser that Cmd+K (mac) and Ctrl+K (win/linux) actually trigger. If window-level keydown listener is shadowed by an input focus, consider attaching to document instead, or stopping propagation when inputs are focused.
Radix a11y warning in console: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen-reader users'. Add <DialogTitle> (optionally wrapped in VisuallyHidden) inside DialogContent for both dialogs.

action_items: Add <DialogTitle> (can use VisuallyHidden) inside TodoFormDialog and CommandDialog to silence Radix a11y console warnings.
Manually verify ⌘K / Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut opens the command palette in real browsers; if not, move the keydown listener to document or ensure handler runs when focus is inside inputs.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard streak computation uses parseISO(t.updated_at); if updated_at is missing on freshly created items, parseISO will throw. Consider guarding with if (!t.updated_at) continue.

CommandPalette keydown listener triggers onOpenChange(!open) from a closure — the 'open' value is captured; effect re-subscribes via dependency, but adding 'open' in deps causes add/remove every toggle which is fine yet slightly wasteful.

AppLayout wraps every page; each page re-mounts AppLayout on navigation, re-creating AppContext and resetting todosRefreshKey. Lift AppLayout to the route tree (e.g., a layout route) to avoid remounts and unnecessary todo re-fetches on each nav.
seed_data_creation: Test task 'TEST_PW_Task1' was created and then deleted during the run; no residual data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend still GREEN (iteration_1). Frontend multi-page layout is working end-to-end: login→/dashboard, sidebar nav, all 4 pages render with expected data-testids (dashboard-page, heatmap-card, streak-card, duetoday-card, upcoming-card, tasks-page, calendar-page, you-page). Task create/edit/delete via TodoFormDialog works (use data-testid='todo-save-btn', not button[type=submit] - it's a regular Button not form submit). Calendar Add pre-fills #due (YYYY-MM-DD). MFA toggle on /you flips data-state between checked/unchecked via API. Theme toggle flips html.dark class and persists localStorage key 'theme'. Logout clears localStorage access_token. /tasks redirects to /login when logged out. Cmd+K palette via topbar-cmdk & sidebar-cmdk-btn buttons works; keyboard shortcut is flaky under Playwright but likely fine in real browsers.
